Notes: Buffalo State Betty Abgott Invitational - Game #2
Buff St. will play Alfred in tomorrow's championship game at 2 p.m.
Hilbert will play Hamilton in consolation at noon.
Game.Officials: Joseph Sarkees,  Martin Brisky,  Chris Cerrone
